edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:28d788e2c5c2

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:dafb66b05f1a
edges.original_sentence: Certain biotic and abiotic conditions inhibited the functional recovery towards natural or other desired targets. As shown by other studies... we detected persistence of early successional, exotic species and/or herbaceous species used for revegetation, which may inhibit the establishment of native species
